Background:
Sarada is the only child of Sasuke and Sakura Uchiha, and the first Uchiha child born since the clan massacre. She was born while her mother was accompanying her father on his travels and was delivered with the help of Sasuke's old teammate, Karin, in one of Orochimaru's hideouts; as such, there is no record of her birth at the Konoha Hospital. As a way to keep a connection with Sasuke, despite being happy for him, Karin kept the umbilical cord between Sakura and Sarada. After that, Sarada's family returned to Konoha to raise her, where her parents helped her learn to walk. During her father's absence from the village while gathering information on Kaguya Ōtsutsuki, she became ill with a high fever during which her mother looked after her. After the fever ended, she began wearing glasses, which unknown to her were a gift from Karin.
thumb|left|Sakura reassuring Sarada that Sasuke cares about them.
Due to the importance of his mission, Sasuke wasn't around much, and it is because of this that Sarada did not know anything about him, including what he physically looked like as an adult. Sakura did her best to comfort Sarada during Sasuke's absence, assuring her that her father loved both of them and that, when he completed his important mission, he'd come home. When this conversation went on for too long, Sakura poked Sarada's forehead and promised to continue it some other time. 
As Sarada's parents continued to stay close to their own childhood friends, she ultimately got to know the kids of her parents' respective friends very well, especially growing close to Boruto Uzumaki. Whilst initially shy and unable to fit in with other children of her group much like her mother, Boruto insisted she join them, becoming one of her first friends, "saving her from loneliness". She also formed close female friendships with Chōchō Akimichi and Sumire Kakei, even confessing her doubts about her family to the other girls. In the anime, Sarada also appears to be close to Inojin Yamanaka and Himawari Uzumaki as well, referring to the younger girl as "Hima-chan". 
On the day of Naruto Uzumaki's inauguration as the Seventh Hokage, Sarada watched the ceremony beside her mother and Chōchō, and silently wondered why it was taking so long for the Hokage to appear.
Personality:
thumb|Sarada's mischievous side.
As a child, Sarada was portrayed to be like her father, after the events of the Uchiha Clan Massacre: unfriendly, unsmiling and sullen, but her personality changed around the time of her Academy graduation. According to Naruto, her personality takes after her mother's, which he bases on the suspicion that Sarada is "scary" when she's angry; she indeed has somewhat of a strong temper, which flares up more often after her appointment to Team Konohamaru. In these and other moments of particularly strong feeling, Sarada often exclaims her mother's characteristic "Shannarō!". According to Chōchō, Sarada is also known for having a very dark side to her when confronting problems. Anger aside, she displays a normal range of emotions, from laughing to crying to blushing in appropriate situations, contrasting with Sasuke's typical stoic reaction to every circumstance. In most situations, Sarada is kind-hearted and brave, polite to others and considerate of her friends and family, wishing well for them and standing up for them when they need her. She doesn't mind saying what she is thinking, whether it is a question she wants the answer to, an opinion she holds firmly, or a frustration she can't let go of. Like Sakura, Sarada is quite well-read: she feels comfortable arguing the differences between a panda and a normal bear, and she is apparently the only participant in the Chūnin Exams to have heard of the book series called Shinobi Strategist Detective Story, much less read all four volumes.
Stemming from her mother's influence, Sarada's wisdom, self-awareness and independence are greater than most of her peers. When Sakura told her Sasuke did have a habit of showing affection that was greater than kissing, Sarada thought Sakura was referring to sexual intercourse. However, she was actually referring to Sasuke's habit of poking her in the forehead. In the anime, Sarada seems to attempt to portray as "normal" and wanting to maintain a certain extent of normality despite her career as a kunoichi, as shown by her habit of cooking for her overworked mother, her refusal of riding on top of a train or attempting to not sprint over buildings, and her genuine fear of horror movies.
The prolonged absences of her father upset Sarada, especially since their clan is so small, and she would periodically ask her mother about him during her childhood.
Abilities:
From being the daughter of two powerful shinobi, Sarada is regarded as an elite genin that excels at everything, While she inherited her father’s natural talent, she is noted in the anime to be even more skilled than he was at her age. She is deemed as a future contender to become Hokage, as her skills were evaluated at top three at the start of her Academy class.  Even before graduating the Academy, her combat skills were already considerably high, being able to quickly subdue several Mangekyo Sharingan-wielding Shin Uchiha clones. In the anime, she could even compete with a fully fledged Kiri-shinobi like Buntan Kurosuki and even defeat her. Three years after becoming a genin, she becomes powerful enough to be able to hold her own against the sentient God Tree, Hidari. Even more, with her Mangekyō Sharingan, she is regarded as crucial in the battle against rest of the Human God Trees, proven by her easily defeating Ryū and several copies of Mamushi.
[Chakra and Physical Prowess] thumb|left|Sarada decimating the ground with chakra-enhanced strength.
As an Uchiha, Sarada has powerful chakra. She also inherited her mother’s expert chakra control and ability to focus it into enhanced strength.  Even before graduating from the Academy, this enhanced strength could allow Sarada to lift and hurl massive structures with ease or release the collected chakra on her strikes after making contact with a target for devastating effect, such as cratering the ground. Though in the anime, this skill was initially underdeveloped, wasting too much chakra and making the end results much weaker. As such, Sakura trained Sarada to better refine it. Eventually, her chakra-enhanced punches became strong enough to slightly crack Deepa's carbon defense, which was previously shown completely withstanding attacks from Mitsuki's Sage Mode and Shinki’s Iron Sand. She is also shown to be very adept in taijutsu, able to maneuver, with great efficiency and strike from various angles. She is also incredibly fast, attacking the Kara Inner, Boro with her Chidori strike at speeds faster than light before he could react in time to avoid it.
